briefdescription.para: Virtual destructor for proper cleanup of derived classes.

briefdescription.para: Check if BLE advertising is active.

simplesect.para: true if advertising, false otherwise

parameterdescription.para: Scan duration in milliseconds (0 for indefinite)

simplesect.para: true if scanning, false otherwise

hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if connected to a device.

simplesect.para: true if connected, false otherwise
hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

parameterdescription.para: PIN code (for Classic, empty for BLE)

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise
hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if paired with a device.

simplesect.para: true if paired, false otherwise
hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Send data to a connected device.

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if data is available to read.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes available, or -1 on error

memberdef.argsstring: (const hf_bluetooth_address_t &address, std::vector< uint8_t > &data, size_t max_bytes=0) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: ReadData

briefdescription.para: Read available data from a connected device.

parameterdescription.para: Maximum bytes to read (0 for all available)

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Discover GATT services on a connected device.

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const hf_bluetooth_address_t &address, const std::string &service_uuid, std::vector< hf_bluetooth_gatt_characteristic_t > &characteristics) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: DiscoverCharacteristics

briefdescription.para: Discover GATT characteristics for a service.

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const hf_bluetooth_address_t &address, const std::string &service_uuid, const std::string &characteristic_uuid, std::vector< uint8_t > &value) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: ReadCharacteristic

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const hf_bluetooth_address_t &address, const std::string &service_uuid, const std::string &characteristic_uuid, const std::vector< uint8_t > &value, bool with_response=true) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: WriteCharacteristic

parameterdescription.para: True to wait for write response

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const hf_bluetooth_address_t &address, const std::string &service_uuid, const std::string &characteristic_uuid, bool enable) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: SubscribeCharacteristic

parameterdescription.para: True to enable notifications, false to disable

simplesect.para: hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise
Current Bluetooth state

briefdescription.para: Get signal strength for a connected device.

simplesect.para: Signal strength in dBm, or INT8_MIN on error
hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise
hf_bluetooth_err_t::BLUETOOTH_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Protected constructor - only derived classes can instantiate.
Copy constructor - deleted to prevent copying.
Assignment operator - deleted to prevent copying.
Abstract base class for Bluetooth functionality.

detaileddescription.para:
This class provides the interface for Bluetooth operations including:
Bluetooth Classic and BLE operations
Device discovery and scanning
Pairing and bonding management
Connection management
Data transmission and reception
GATT operations (for BLE)
Event handling and callbacks
